name: Scones
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together flour, baking powder, salt, and sugar.
2. Cut in shortening with fingers until the mixture resembles coarse crumbs.
3. Add currants and baking soda to the mix and stir into the flour mixture with a fork.
4. Turn out onto a floured board. Knead slightly.
5. Pat or roll into rounds about 1/2 inch thick.
6. Cut into triangles or circles.
7. Bake on an ungreased griddle over medium heat until golden brown, about 12-15 minutes per side.
8. As one side becomes browned, turn the scones and continue baking the other side until golden brown.
9. Turn each scone slightly on edge and place back onto the griddle to finish cooking.
10. Remove from the griddle when all edges are lightly browned. The scones will be cooked through from all sides, ensuring no raw dough remains in the center.
11. Split and serve with butter or fill with ingredients such as ham or cream cheese.
